release_notes_prs.title: Add organization-level access presets
release_notes_prs.author: fixture-user
release_notes_prs.body: Adds organization-level role presets so admins can apply consistent access policies across teams.

release_notes_prs.title: Improve service account audit events
release_notes_prs.author: fixture-user
release_notes_prs.body: Improves audit events for service account creation and token rotation.

entries.title: Stronger organization controls
entries.description: Admins can apply consistent access presets and inspect service-account activity with clearer audit events.

release_notes_body.content:
#### Stronger organization controls

Organization admins can now apply reusable access presets across teams, making policy rollout more consistent. Service account audit events are also clearer, especially around credential creation and rotation.
